title: SACRAMENTO, CA-
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Assembly Bill 467 requires equal prize compensation for all athletes, regardless of gender, as a condition for approving a lease or permit request for any sporting event held on state lands.
Equal pay disparities exist in almost every major sport.
The passing of AB 467 is a societal shift toward equity and progress.
The implementation of AB 467 is projected to set precedence for women everywhere.
